eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Nance, NE; at 04:14 AM ON APR 14, 2026 Effective until 04:14 AM APR 15, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: WATER EMERGENCY - Absolutely no water use in the city of Genoa. There is a main water break, with a minimal supply coming to town. Please no sprinklers or excessive water use. We are working on a solution for drinking water. Avoid N. 390th Ave., closed from 63A link to N 440th St. as water is running across the road. Contact local officials and city office with any questions.
